title: À l'école de l'universel: Germaine Le Goff, l'histoire d'une pionnière
original_title: À l'école de l'universel: Germaine Le Goff, l'histoire d'une pionnière
overview: The story of a pioneer, Germaine Le Goff (1891-1986). After World War I, the Breton teacher left Douarnenez for adventure, with a journey that led her to Senegal. In 1938, she founded and directed a teacher training college in Rufisque, near Dakar, the first for primary school teachers in Africa.

trailers.title: Germaine LeGoff, l'école de l'Universel en Afrique
